content.en:
The appearance of the Origin Gate attracted the attention of all the forces in the entire Great Universe, and although they did not dare to pass through the Origin Gate for the time being, they began to clear the danger of the Purple Light World at a huge cost.

Before, although the purple light world attracted the attention of many Heavenly Monarchs, not all Heavenly Monarchs came, for example, the Heavenly Monarchs in the top few Heavenly Monarchs did not come, and those Heavenly Monarchs were truly powerful, far surpassing Pengyu Heavenly Monarchs.

These Heavenly Monarchs arrived, and they entered the Purple Light World with half-way weapons in their hands, and they only paid a little price, and they would completely kill the Purple Spirit Golden Worm and some powerful purple light creatures.

In this way, the danger of the purple light world was lowered by one level.

......

The Void Heaven Temple Station.

Ye Tian saw Pengyu Tianjun again, and at this moment, Pengyu Tianjun looked excited and expectant.

"Senior Brother Pengyu!"

Ye Tian said politely.

"Daozi, the Void Heaven is about to send someone!"

Pengyu Tianjun said.

"What!" Ye Tian was shocked, "Isn't it a long time for the second batch of personnel to arrive, how long has it been?"

"According to the normal situation, it will take at least hundreds of millions of years before the major forces in the chaos will send the second batch of personnel to arrive, but the appearance of the Origin Gate makes the True Ancestors in the Chaos can't help it, the Dao Ancestors don't care, but the True Ancestors care too much. They will pay a certain price to let a small number of strong people enter the big universe, and they can still afford this price. "

Pengyu Tianjun said.

"Why?"

Ye Tian asked.

Peng Yu Tianjun explained: "Daozi, you may have heard some news about the Origin Gate, but the real secret is not clear to ordinary people. The Gate of Origin leads to the Innate Origin Land, and even though the Innate Origin Land is different, it has one thing in common, that is, it contains great creation. It is rumored that some eight-star peak god generals, if they enter the innate origin land to obtain great creation, they can step into the early combat power of the nine-star god generals, and are even expected to enter the middle stage of the nine star god generals. In addition, if the Heavenly Monarch entered the Innate Origin Land, he would be able to assist in condensing the Supreme True Spirit and step into the True Spirit Realm with the strongest foundation! Therefore, for those powerful Divine Generals and Heavenly Monarchs, the Innate Origin Land was too precious. For example, we do not have an innate origin land, because the innate origin land cannot exist forever, and once the origin is exhausted, the innate origin land will collapse. This is the same as our refining and consuming innate origin matter, which is a one-time item. This kind of great opportunity, the Void Heaven Sect and other Dao Ancestor Lines attach great importance to it, and some of the eight-star peak god generals in the chaos and the invincible Heavenly Monarch who are at the peak of the Heavenly Mandate are all crazy, and they all want to enter the great universe. "

"But the purple light is very dangerous, how dangerous is that innate origin place, once you enter, I'm afraid you will be eroded by the purple light and die, right?" Ye Tian expressed his worries.

"Hahaha, don't worry, some True Ancestors in the outside world who are good at deduction have already found a way, and are even refining something that can allow us to enter the Origin Gate safely. It's just that if you enter the Gate of Origin, you will get such a great creation, then you have to rely on yourself!"

......

Time passes slowly, and in the blink of an eye, it is a hundred years.

this day.

The origin of the great universe shook, and one after another figures appeared inside the great universe.

At the same time, the Ancestral Monument's Divine General List and Heavenly Monarch List have changed.

For example, Pengyu Tianjun was originally ranked eighteenth on the Tianjun list, but now he has fallen out of the top fifty all of a sudden.

The changes in the list of god generals are also very large, Ye Tian was ranked first on the list of god generals before, but now he has fallen out of the top ten all of a sudden, ranking eleventh, and the top ten are all nine-star god generals, among which there is a nine-star mid-stage god general.

And there are many more eight-star peak god generals, but Ye Tian's strength is too strong, and other eight-star peak god generals can't surpass him at all.

As for the ranking of the Yunzi Goddess, it was miserable, and she fell out of the top 100 all of a sudden.

This time, these eight-star peak and above god generals who have entered the great universe are all famous Tianjiao in the chaos, and they don't know how many billion years of cultivation, and their strength is naturally strong, but they have basically come to an end, and it is difficult to enter again.

But this time, the appearance of the Innate Origin Land attracted their attention, and they naturally wanted to enter the Great Universe to build a stronger foundation for themselves.

The Void Heaven One Pulse also came this time with at least dozens of god generals and hundreds of Heavenly Monarchs, which is already the most places that the Void Heaven One Pulse can fight for, and the people who are qualified to enter the big universe are not ordinary.

Among them are the descendants of the True Ancestor, the descendants of the Dao Ancestor, and the true disciples of the Void Heaven lineage.

The true disciple is different from the Dao Ancestor's personal lineage, the Dao Ancestor's personal disciple represents the Dao Ancestor's personal disciple, while the true disciple represents a very high talent and strong strength, so that he has obtained a very high status in the Void Heaven Lineage, far surpassing other disciples.

The Dao Ancestor must be a true disciple, but the true disciple is not necessarily the Dao Ancestor, but every true disciple is very powerful, and the minimum strength needs an eight-star god general.

And most of the true disciples of the Void Heaven lineage came, and the strongest one of them was the first true disciple of this generation - the Left Wolf Divine General!

The Left Wolf Divine General is a Nine-Star Early Divine General, and he is also the son of a True Ancestor of the Void Heaven Lineage, both in terms of strength and status, and has been cultivating for a long time, and has been working hard to impact the mid-Nine Star Divine General, otherwise, he would have entered the Heavenly Mandate Realm long ago.

The status of the true disciple is not the same as that of the Dao Ancestor, although it is a little worse, but the gap is not much, but it is still necessary to call the Dao Ancestor as the Dao Son, which is the rule of the Void Heaven.

The second batch of Divine Generals and Heavenly Monarchs who came in from the Void Heaven First Vein soon came to the Void Heaven Palace, and Ye Tian also saw these people.

"I've seen the Ten Thousand Laws!"

One Heavenly Monarch said respectfully.

Even the high-status True Disciple Zuo Wolf Divine General said respectfully: "I've seen the Ten Thousand Laws Dao!"

Ye Tian responded a few words, and then discussed the matter of the Origin Gate with the Heavenly Monarchs.

At this time, a Heavenly Monarch spoke, this person is the first person of the Heavenly Monarch of the Void Heaven lineage, and he is also a disciple of a Dao Ancestor, but he is not a personal disciple, but a formal disciple, but his seniority is not as good as Ye Tian.

Because this Heavenly Monarch is a disciple of another Dao Ancestor of the Void Heaven lineage, and that Dao Ancestor is the personal disciple of the Void Heaven Dao Ancestor.

But no one dares to underestimate this Heavenly Monarch, after all, the first person who can rank among the Heavenly Monarchs in this era is so powerful, even in today's Heavenly Monarch list, he can rank sixth.

He is the Moon Swallowing Heavenly Monarch!
